untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detecting an RSI uptrend line breakout and industry group ranking filters. RSI uptrend line detection (20-period trendline) and industry group rank comparisons are not available in the allowed indicator set. RSI_14 trend detection and trendline crossing mechanics cannot be precisely replicated with available indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation: Used rsi_14 > 70 for strong momentum entry condition and rsi_14 crossing below its SMA as a proxy for uptrend deterioration. However, the core signal requires: (1) detection of a custom RSI uptrend line (not a standard indicator), (2) industry group ranking (not provided), and (3) precise trendline break mechanics. The exit condition 'any close below 20-period RS uptrend line' cannot be expressed with available operators and indicators.
